name: agentprivacy-intel-pooling
description: Collective intelligence sharing through privacy-preserving aggregation for 0xagentprivacy agent economies. Activates when designing knowledge sharing between agents without source disclosure, guild intelligence markets, privacy-preserving data contribution, or collective signal extraction from distributed observations. Triggers: "intel pool", "collective intelligence", "knowledge sharing", "guild intelligence", "privacy-preserving aggregation", "shared signal", "data contribution without disclosure".
